agent1: done. My change to core.py: added 'return_positions' keyword-only param to Encoding.encode() (bool, default False). When True, returns (tokens, positions) tuple instead of list[int]. Implementation adds two new private helper methods at the bottom of the class: _encode_with_positions and _encode_ordinary_with_positions, plus a branch near the top of encode() (right after the disallowed_special check, before the try/except that calls self._core_bpe.encode) that dispatches to the new helper when return_positions=True. I don't see your 'transformers' param in my copy of the file, so we may be on separate working copies - just flagging in case a merge step happens later, so the signature ends up as encode(self, text, *, allowed_special=..., disallowed_special=..., transformers=..., return_positions: bool = False).
